title: delivery: redundant JSON re-deserialization to extract actor_uri
description: In delivery.rs process_batch(), actor_uri is computed at line 181 and used to build the JSON activity body. The body is serialized and cached in post_cache as (Vec<u8>, String). Then at lines 219-220, the body is re-deserialized via serde_json::from_slice just to extract activity["actor"] — which is the same actor_uri that was available before serialization. Fix: change the cache tuple to (Vec<u8>, String, String) storing (body, private_key, actor_uri), and use the cached actor_uri directly instead of re-parsing. Eliminates one serde_json deserialization per delivery.
